haikus.haiku:
Sweet dough rolls and hugs,
Frosting swirls in colors bright,
Joyful bites of bliss.
Happy #NationalSugarCookieDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Sunshine on bare skin,
Gentle breeze through the warm air,
Freedom feels like joy.
Happy #NationalNoBraDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Electric sparks fly,
Whispers of a bright future,
Genius lights the way.
#HappyBirthdayNikolaTesla from @ClamBakeSanta

content:
Sweet dough rolls and hugs,
Frosting swirls in colors bright,
Joyful bites of bliss.

Electric sparks fly,

Genius lights the way.
